ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to a survey or questionnaire */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group of the voter */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the voter */,
  "file_race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial or ethnic group of the voter (from file data) */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender of the voter */,
  "race_eth" TEXT /* Racial or ethnic group of the voter (self-identified) */,
  "approve" TEXT /* Approval rating of a politician or policy */,
  "genballot" TEXT /* Generic ballot preference */,
  "hdem_fav" TEXT /* Favorability rating of a Democratic politician */,
  "hrep_fav" TEXT /* Favorability rating of a Republican politician */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic region of the voter */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the political party of the voter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the voter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the voter record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the voter record is active */,
  "voter_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "voter_address" TEXT /* Address of the voter for more detailed geographic analysis */,
  "voter_email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter for contact purposes */,
  "voter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter for contact purposes */,
  "voter_income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the voter for economic analysis */,
  "voter_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_file_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., High school, Some college, Bachelors' degree) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the education level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the education level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial or ethnic group */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial or ethnic group (e.g., White, Black or African American) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gender was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party (e.g., Democratic, Republican) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the party was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the party was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who responded to the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the questionnaire used in the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the survey response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the survey response was last updated */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey response (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaires" (
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire */,
  "questionnaire_name" TEXT /* Name of the questionnaire */,
  "questionnaire_date" TEXT /* Date the questionnaire was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the questionnaire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the questionnaire was last updated */,
  "questionnaire_version" TEXT /* Version number of the questionnaire to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weights" (
  "weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter to whom the weight is assigned */,
  "weight_value" REAL /* Value of the weight */,
  "weight_date" TEXT /* Date the weight was assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weight was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weights_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)
